sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Tesla Shares Are Falling Today: What's Going On? - Tesla  ( NASDAQ:TSLA )
feed.summary: Tesla's stock fell 4.67% after a 12% drop in vehicle deliveries for Q1 2025, largely due to production delays, weak demand in key markets. Tesla faces ongoing challenges with brand perception under Elon Musk and increased competition, leading to a 32% decline in the stock YTD.
